This model launched alongside the Mars 3.0 e-bike in August, and has only seen two previous discounts in its history – both dropping the costs to $1,399. Now, you’re looking at the third-ever discount to date, giving you $500 off the new tag price (and $579 total savings with the bundle) for the second-best price we have tracked. This model also has a more colorful Limited Miami Sunset option for $1,699 shipped, down from $2,199, which comes with a pannier bag and a gift pack filled with a variety of accessories. This particular model has been keeping down from its full $599 price tag since January, with discounts over the last year having gone as low as $349, which we last saw during Black Friday. This same rate has been holding strong through the last few sales we’ve seen through February (outside of some one-day flash sales), with it continuing into this month with a $150 markdown that lands it just $100 above the Black Friday low. items.summary:

Regularly $70, you can now score a proper U.S. boxed copy down at $54.99 Prime shipped. A $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise. It is still fetching nearly full price at Amazon where it has never sold for less than $65. While this one might not have ended being the epic long-time Metroid and Metroid Prime fans were hoping for, this is a solid chance to give it a run and add it to your Switch collection. I happen to think it is very much worth a play though at this price and there’s no telling how long it will take to see it down at $40 or less.

We have seen a few of the Apple accessory deals we spotted last week as part of the early Presidents Day sales come and go since then but many of them are now returning this morning. Apple’s white Magic Mouse, for example, is now back down at the Amazon low.
